aboutMe.label: About Me
aboutMe.heading: I'm LocT, a detail-oriented Front-end Developer dedicated to architecting scalable systems and delivering ultra-smooth digital experiences.
aboutMe.description: Every project I take on is rooted in performance and clean code. With a background in 2D Animation and deep expertise in Next.js and Micro-frontends, I bridge the gap between complex logic and fluid UI/UX. I bring robust architecture, state management optimization, and pixel-perfect design to the table.

jobs.desc: Led Frontend architecture for 4+ key Next.js projects. Optimized UI/UX workflows and utilized AI Agents to accelerate MVP deployment by 80%.
Designed and produced motion graphics and character animations for various projects. Maintained a 100% positive client rating on Upwork through effective communication.
Graduated with Excellence. Built a strong foundation in algorithmic thinking, data structures, and software systems development.

short-video-feed-sdk.title: Short Video Feed SDK
short-video-feed-sdk.subtitle: This is an internal software development kit (SDK), specifically designed to build the Short Video Feed feature.

details.headingPart1: The project focuses on providing a powerful "Plug-and-Play" solution, allowing host applications (Host Apps) to embed short video streams with just a few lines of code while ensuring maximum performance.
details.description: The project is built on a Headless SDK model, completely separating processing logic and display interface. This SDK is optimized for resource-constrained environments like Mobile, where playing multiple videos at the same time often causes memory and lag issues.

meta.role: As the Front-end Engineer, I designed the core video engine and 'Headless' architecture. I focused on resource management (DOM Pooling), custom lightweight gestures, and bundle size optimization for seamless integration.

painPoints.heading: Developing a seamless short-video SDK demanded overcoming strict WebView resource limits, network latency, and rigorous bundle size constraints.
list: **WebView Resource Limits**: Mitigating high RAM consumption and OS-level terminations within low-priority mobile WebViews while continuously rendering high-quality video streams.
**Zero-latency Instant Play**: Overcoming network latency to engineer a flawless "Instant Play" mechanic upon scrolling, completely eliminating disruptive loading states.
**Deep UI Customizability**: Architecting a flexible UI interface (ActionBar, AuthorInfo) that allows deep client customization without compromising the complex core video-sliding logic.
**Strict Bundle Size Control**: Keeping the JavaScript payload exceptionally lightweight to ensure the embedded SDK does not degrade the host application's initial load performance.

keyFeatures.heading: A robust, backend-agnostic SDK engineered for 60fps performance, strict memory safety, and seamless integration into any host application.
list: **Zero-Crash & DOM Pooling**: Achieved absolute WebView stability by implementing a strict Resource Governor that pools a maximum of 3 video DOM nodes, completely eliminating memory leaks.

**60FPS Performance & Ultra-light Gestures**: Delivered sub-second video loads and buttery-smooth 60fps swiping using a custom-built, ultra-lightweight (~1.5KB) gesture handler instead of bloated libraries.

**Backend-Agnostic Hexagonal Architecture**: Structured on a Hexagonal Architecture, ensuring the SDK remains completely decoupled from any specific backend API, allowing effortless plug-and-play integration.
**Optimistic UI & Zero-Latency Feel**: Engineered an Optimistic UI for instant social interactions (likes, comments) with automatic background rollbacks, creating a lag-free user experience.
**Mixed Content Ecosystem**: Architected a flexible feed system capable of seamlessly rendering both short-form videos and rich-text articles within the same continuous scroll.

result.heading: Delivering an ultra-lightweight, ~90KB embeddable SDK that guarantees 60fps performance, absolute WebView stability, and effortless integration with any client data structure.
list: **Ultra-lightweight Bundle**: Engineered a highly optimized SDK weighing only ~90KB (gzipped), ensuring zero negative impact on the host application's initial load time.
**Flawless 60FPS Performance**: Achieved absolute smoothness and a stable 60fps frame rate via direct DOM manipulation for progress bars and a custom position-based virtual scroller.
**Universal API Compatibility**: Enabled seamless integration with any client data structure using Preset Configurations and Custom Transformers, requiring zero core code modifications.
**Zero-Crash Reliability**: Eradicated WebView memory leaks and crashes entirely by deploying a strict Resource Governor to safely manage concurrent video playbacks.

yaah-connect.title: Yaah Connect
yaah-connect.subtitle: App optimized for booking and managing sports fields.

details.headingPart1: Yaah connect is a modern, high-end platform, not only providing information but also an ecosystem connecting players, courts and professional sports organizations.
details.description: The project is built to bring a strong, professional feeling with the main color tone being dark colors combined with Neon green. The goal of the application is to optimize the process of searching, booking courts and tracking competition levels through deep integration with international ranking systems.

meta.role: As Frontend Engineer, I designed the technical architecture and selected the core tech stack. I took primary responsibility for development, implementation of smooth animations, and real-time data synchronization, while collaborating with BAs and Designers to refine UI/UX for optimal mobile performance.

painPoints.heading: Driven by rigorous user experience standards, the project demanded solving major hurdles in rich media performance, complex data synchronization, and cross-browser optimization.
list: **Media & Animation Performance**: Mitigating mobile browser overload while simultaneously rendering continuous video Reels, high-res court images, and complex GSAP animations.

**Multi-source Data Synchronization**: Seamlessly orchestrating and combining real-time data logic across third-party endpoints (DUPR API), the core system Backend, and local Client State (Favorites).
**Comprehensive i18n Management**: Strictly managing dynamic translations to ensure 100% language coverage for complex app states, real-time booking statuses, and system error messages.
**In-app Browser & Low-end Optimization**: Maintaining high-end UI/UX fidelity and smooth interactions across low-tier mobile devices and constrained in-app browser environments.

keyFeatures.heading: An all-in-one sports booking ecosystem seamlessly blending real-time reservations, global ranking integrations, and interactive community engagement.
list: **Smart Booking Engine**: A location-based discovery engine (Near You) featuring real-time court availability, dynamic pricing, and complex amenity filters.
**Global DUPR Integration**: The platform's defining feature: direct integration with the global DUPR API to sync Pickleball ratings, enabling skill-based matchmaking and ranked tournament entries.
**Media Hub**: A built-in community ecosystem featuring interactive short-form video Reels, curated sports news, and online chat functionalities.
**Event & Tournament Management**: Dynamic Hero Banners and dedicated modules for effortlessly showcasing and registering for upcoming Pickleball events and tournaments.
**Personalized User Experience**: Comprehensive user profiles equipped with personalized favorites management, detailed booking histories, and tailored preferences.
**Real-time Socket Updates**: Instant push notifications, live booking status updates, and seamless in-app messaging powered by robust WebSocket connections.

result.heading: Delivering a premium, rock-solid platform that seamlessly balances striking visual impact with a strictly modular, type-safe architecture.
list: **Premium Visual Impact**: Engineered a striking "Wow effect" upon the first visit by leveraging complex GSAP animations and a bold Neon brand color system.
**Absolute Modularity**: Eliminated "spaghetti code" despite the massive scale (hundreds of files) by strictly adhering to a feature-sliced architecture (`src/features`).
**Seamless Location Engine**: Delivered a highly practical user experience with flawless Google Maps API integration and real-time spatial distance calculations.
**Rock-solid Stability**: Minimized runtime and logic errors by enforcing rigorous code standards using strict TypeScript, Zod schema validations, and Biome.

rainydays-wallpaper.title: Rainydays Wallpaper
rainydays-wallpaper.subtitle: A website specialized for sharing and downloading high-quality wallpapers.

details.headingPart1: The project is designed with a modern, minimalist interface in the style of Pinterest, focusing maximally on the user's visual experience. The name 'Rainydays' evokes a wallpaper style with a chill, gentle, and artistic trend.
details.description: A digital gallery featuring a responsive Masonry grid, tag-based search, and direct downloads. It is powered by a robust CMS for seamless admin content management.

painPoints.heading: Building a high-performance visual platform required solving complex manual DOM calculations, intricate mobile touch interactions, and multi-relational data synchronization.
list: **Custom Masonry Algorithm**: Architecting a custom Masonry grid from scratch, utilizing complex mathematical logic to calculate dynamic `top` and `left` positioning without relying on external libraries.
**Mobile Touch UX**: Engineering precise mobile touch interactions (Touch Start, Move, End) to trigger fluid, responsive download menus, demanding meticulous event lifecycle management.
**Multi-relational Data Sync**: Ensuring strict data consistency during uploads by seamlessly orchestrating database updates across both `images` and `tags` collections simultaneously.
**High-Res Asset Performance**: Mitigating UI lag while rendering multiple high-resolution assets by strategically implementing Infinite Scrolling and Lazy Loading mechanisms.

keyFeatures.heading: A feature-rich visual discovery platform combining intuitive mobile gestures, real-time analytics, and fluid media rendering to deliver a premium, native-like user experience.
list: **Dynamic Masonry & Theme Adaptation**: Engineered a visually striking waterfall grid that auto-arranges based on true image dimensions, completely synchronized with system-level or user-toggled Dark/Light modes.
**Infinite Scroll & Smart Tagging**: Maximized initial load speeds via infinite scrolling while empowering intuitive discovery through automated tag suggestions and tag-based routing.
**Native-Grade Mobile Gestures**: Simulated a premium native app experience by implementing intricate long-press touch events to trigger instant, fluid download menus on mobile devices.
**Social Ecosystem & Real-time Analytics**: Amplified content reach via direct Pinterest and TikTok integrations while seamlessly tracking user engagement with automated, real-time view counters.

architecture.heading: A high-performance Serverless Single Page Application (SPA) built with modern React ecosystems and fully powered by Firebase's robust Backend-as-a-Service.
list: **Comprehensive Serverless BaaS**: Leveraged the full Firebase SDK v10 suite—utilizing Auth for Google SSO, Firestore NoSQL for relational metadata (images & tags), Storage for high-res assets, and Analytics.

**Modern SPA Foundation**: Developed a reactive Single Page Application using React 18 functional components, centralizing state via Context API, and securing admin workflows with React Router v6 Private Routes.

**Performance-Driven UI**: Styled rapidly with Tailwind CSS for highly flexible layouts, achieving superior initial load times through `React.lazy` and `Suspense`, complemented by `react-toastify` for professional user feedback.

result.heading: Delivering a highly optimized, touch-first visual platform that ensures flawless cross-device responsiveness, professional-grade rendering, and highly efficient data pagination.
list: **Professional-Grade Smooth Masonry**: Engineered a flawless custom `renderLayout` system that precisely calculates image coordinates, delivering a buttery-smooth visual experience comparable to top-tier commercial applications.
**Touch-First Mobile Experience**: Prioritized mobile users by implementing highly stable, native-like long-press interactions for instant image downloads, maximizing convenience on touch devices.

**Optimized Pagination & Memory**: Achieved highly efficient, bandwidth-friendly pagination and infinite scrolling by strategically utilizing Firebase's `startAfter` cursors, strictly preventing DOM and memory overloads.

**Flawless Responsive Adaptability**: Ensured pixel-perfect rendering across all viewports, dynamically adapting from expansive desktop wide-views to highly optimized single or double-column layouts on mobile screens.

sudoku-game.title: Sudoku Game
sudoku-game.subtitle: Play Sudoku puzzle offline on your desktop! 🎮

details.headingPart1: The project is a modern Sudoku game application for the Desktop platform, built on the Electron platform combined with React. This is a complete product, not only focusing on game logic but also investing heavily in user experience and vivid interface.
details.description: The project focuses on creating a distraction-free gaming environment, optimizing micro-interactions from number entry to intelligent note-taking systems based on real-world Sudoku techniques.

painPoints.heading: Building a cross-platform Sudoku application required solving complex algorithmic puzzle generation, optimizing grid rendering, and mastering Electron configurations.
list: **Algorithmic Complexity & Unique Solutions**: Architecting a robust generation algorithm that not only strictly follows Sudoku rules but also mathematically guarantees a single, unique solution for every puzzle.

**High-frequency Grid Rendering**: Optimizing React component lifecycles to eliminate input lag across an 81-cell grid containing multiple dynamic states (notes, highlights, real-time error validations).
**State & Logic Synchronization**: Engineering a seamless, decoupled synchronization pipeline between complex core algorithmic utilities and the display UI managed by the Redux Store.
**Cross-Platform Electron Packaging**: Configuring the Electron environment to efficiently package and deploy a highly stable, unified codebase across Windows, macOS, and Linux operating systems.

keyFeatures.heading: A fully featured, cross-platform Sudoku desktop application powered by advanced algorithms, persistent state management, and a native-grade user experience.
list: **Dynamic Generation & Difficulty**: Engineered a dynamic board generator supporting multiple difficulty tiers via a custom `removeKDigits` algorithm, ensuring randomized yet valid and unique puzzles.

**Backtracking Solver & Hints**: Integrated a highly optimized **Backtracking** algorithm to solve any board instantly, validating player moves in real-time and providing intelligent, mathematically accurate hints.
**Interactive UI & Note System**: Delivered a buttery-smooth interface featuring a dedicated cell-level Note mode, fluid transitions, and a comprehensive navigation system (Home, Continue, Help).
**Persistent Progress Management**: Implemented robust local state persistence, allowing users to effortlessly save and seamlessly resume their in-progress games across different app sessions.
**Pure Native Desktop Experience**: Locked down the Electron wrapper by disabling default browser shortcuts (F12, Alt) to simulate a strict, distraction-free native desktop application environment.

architecture.heading: A meticulously structured, type-safe Electron application leveraging modern React ecosystems and a rigorous separation of concerns.
list: **Strict Main/Renderer Isolation**: Built on Electron with a clear architectural boundary between the OS-level Main Process and the React-driven UI Renderer Process.

**Type-Safe Logic & State Decoupling**: Utilized strict TypeScript for complex 9x9 matrix typing, completely decoupling core generation/validation algorithms from the centralized Redux Toolkit game state.
**Modular UI & Premium Animations**: Structured highly reusable component patterns powered by Material UI, SCSS, and Framer Motion to deliver premium, lag-free micro-animations.
**Professional Tooling & QA**: Configured a robust, enterprise-grade development pipeline ensuring code quality and stability via Webpack, Jest for unit testing, and rigorous ESLint standards.

result.heading: Delivering a commercial-grade, standalone desktop puzzle game powered by millisecond-execution algorithms, fluid rendering, and a highly scalable architecture.
list: **Millisecond Algorithmic Execution**: Successfully implemented an optimized **Recursive Backtracking** algorithm, enabling the generation and solving of complex Sudoku grids in mere milliseconds.
**Commercial-Grade Fluidity**: Achieved commercial-grade app initialization and fluid scene transitions by strategically combining React Suspense, lazy loading, and Framer Motion.

**Highly Scalable Codebase**: Established a highly maintainable, type-safe foundation using TypeScript and Redux Toolkit, ensuring effortless future scalability for Online Multiplayer or Leaderboard features.
**Production-Ready Executable**: Successfully packaged a production-ready, standalone desktop installer via `electron-builder`, completely breaking free from traditional web browser constraints.

graph-builder.title: Graph Builder X
graph-builder.subtitle: Interactive drag-and-drop tool for generating complex node graphs.

details.description: A powerful tool that allows users to create, connect, and visualize complex graphs through an intuitive drag-and-drop interface.

painPoints.heading: The Challenge: Visualizing Logic
list: Visualizing complex relationships is hard.
Lack of fluid drag-and-drop node editors.
Real-time visual node editing
Seamless export and flexible workflows

uni-portal.title: UniPortal
uni-portal.subtitle: Join UniPortal in building a modern, connected, and smart campus.

details.headingPart1: Expanded app for students, provides academic features (View timetable, register courses, study plans), update news, and chat messaging.
details.description: Welcome to UniPortal - the pioneering application in the comprehensive digital transformation journey for universities and the student community in Vietnam! UniPortal is not just an app; it is a smart assistant that makes your campus life easier, more efficient, and more connected than ever before.

meta.role: As the Frontend Engineer, I architected the project's technical foundation and selected the core tech stack. I took full responsibility for the primary development, while actively collaborating with BAs and Designers to define requirements and propose critical UX/UI refinements to enhance the overall user journey.

painPoints.heading: The challenge is to maintain stability and performance for a multi-functional ecosystem (Finance, Education, News) running on a Hybrid platform.
list: **Hybrid communication (Web - Native)**: Closely synchronizes logic between Next.js and Flutter Shell, solving complex cross-debugging problems and the risk of broken communication on WebView.
**State & Hydration Management**: Handles architectural conflicts between Server Components and Client State (Redux Persist) when storing large amounts of local data.
**Mobile Performance Optimization**: Ensures smooth 60fps experience when embedding heavy UIs (Maps, Video, Dnd-kit, Motion) on low-configuration devices.
**Multi-business Logic & Auth**: Securely integrates Digital Wallets, Learning systems, and custom SSO, requiring strict handling of network failure or background app scenarios.
**Cutting-edge Technology Compatibility**: Manages risks and resolves library conflicts when applying the latest tech stack (Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind v4).

keyFeatures.heading: A comprehensive suite of robust modules engineered to deliver a scalable, multi-tenant, and native-like digital campus experience.
list: **Academic Management**: Fully integrated LMS modules streamlining complex workflows like course registration, dynamic timetables, and personalized study planning.
**Multi-tenant Authentication**: Advanced `next-auth` implementation supporting seamless multi-school tenant selection and highly secure, complex token lifecycles.

**Native-grade Mobile UX**: Bridging the web-app gap with hardware-level interactions (Vibration, Wakelock, QR Scanning) and fluid UI elements (Drag-and-drop widgets, Pull-to-refresh, Virtual Numpad).
**Rich Media & Streaming**: High-performance media delivery featuring an integrated campus news feed and smooth HLS video streaming via custom `VideoPlayerHLS`.
**Real-time Communication**: A built-in, real-time campus messaging ecosystem powered by the robust internal SDK.
**Maps, Utilities & i18n**: Interactive campus navigation via OpenStreetMap/Leaflet, live weather APIs, and seamless multi-language routing powered by `next-intl`.

result.heading: By overcoming complex architectural bottlenecks, we delivered a high-performance, future-proof ecosystem that redefines the digital campus experience.
list: **Native-like Web Experience:** Eradicated the Web-App boundary via an optimized Flutter Bridge, delivering instant hardware capabilities (Camera, GPS, QR) directly on the web interface.
**Highly Customizable Dashboard:** Empowered users with a modular drag-and-drop dashboard (Dnd-kit), optimizing complex UX by allowing personalized widget layouts without information overload.
**Persistent State Management:** Implemented deep Redux Persistence to secure user states, ensuring an absolutely seamless experience even during network drops, updates, or background kills.
**Flawless Media Performance:** Handled heavy media and graphic logic seamlessly (XGPlayer, Leaflet, Framer Motion), ensuring News feeds, Reels, and financial charts run flawlessly without jank.
**Future-proof Architecture:** Built a pioneering foundation using Next.js 15, React 19, and Tailwind v4, enabling faster builds (Turbopack) and effortless scaling of future "Mini Apps".
**All-in-one Ecosystem:** Successfully merged an E-wallet, an LMS portal, and an Internal Social Network into a single touchpoint, maximizing engagement for the student community.
